issues.description: First effect missing condition logic: should be conditional trash (may trash 1 from Life), then IF Leader has {Straw Hat Crew} type, add up to 2 from deck to Life. Current DSL only removes life without the conditional add-to-life action.
Condition type 'HasCardOnBoard' with name 'Straw Hat Crew' is incorrect. Should be 'LeaderHasType' with type '{Straw Hat Crew}' to check if leader has that type.
Actions incomplete: RemoveLife from Life cards is correct, but missing the conditional subsequent action to add up to 2 cards from deck to Life cards when condition is met.
Second effect missing duration marker. Text states '[Opponent's Turn] [On K.O.]' which means this ability only triggers during opponent's turn. Should include duration:'DuringOpponentTurn'.

Action type 'RemoveLife' is incorrect for dealing damage to opponent. Should be 'RemoveLife' targeting opponent, or the intent is to damage opponent (1 damage = 1 life removed from opponent). Verify this should affect opponent's life, not player's life.
